requirement_topic.en: EMC and Power Quality — IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 Evidence for PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: EMC和电能质量——光伏逆变器IEC 62920 / IEC 61000证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC和電能品質——光伏逆變器IEC 62920 / IEC 61000證據

summary.en: Djibouti has limited publicly accessible PV-inverter-specific national EMC rules. For grid-tied PV inverter projects, the practical compliance package should therefore be built around internationally recognised IEC evidence requested by EDD, the Ministry of Energy, donors, lenders, EPCs, or project owners. IEC 62920 is the dedicated EMC standard for PV power conversion equipment, while the IEC 61000 series covers harmonic emissions, flicker, immunity, and other power-quality topics. Because Djibouti imports much of its electricity from Ethiopia hydro and is pursuing geothermal and solar additions, project reviewers may focus on grid stability, harmonics, and protection coordination for new distributed generation.
summary.zh: 吉布提公开可取得的光伏逆变器专项国家EMC规则有限。因此，对于并网光伏逆变器项目，实际合规包应围绕EDD、能源部、捐助方、贷款方、EPC或项目业主要求的国际认可IEC证据建立。IEC 62920是光伏功率变换设备的专用EMC标准，IEC 61000系列涵盖谐波排放、闪变、抗扰度及其他电能质量事项。由于吉布提大量电力进口自埃塞俄比亚水电，同时推动地热和太阳能增量，项目审查方可能关注新增分布式发电的电网稳定、谐波和保护协调。
summary.zht: 吉布地公開可取得的光伏逆變器專項國家EMC規則有限。因此，對於併網光伏逆變器項目，實際合規包應圍繞EDD、能源部、捐助方、貸款方、EPC或項目業主要求的國際認可IEC證據建立。IEC 62920是光伏功率轉換設備的專用EMC標準，IEC 61000系列涵蓋諧波排放、閃變、抗擾度及其他電能品質事項。由於吉布地大量電力進口自衣索比亞水電，同時推動地熱和太陽能增量，項目審查方可能關注新增分散式發電的電網穩定、諧波和保護協調。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility, including harmonic current emissions, flicker, immunity, and power-quality limits as specified by the project
EDD or project-owner power-quality and commissioning requirements where applicable

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly prepared under GB/T 37408-2021 and related domestic testing by CNAS-accredited laboratories. These tests support China domestic voluntary certification and grid-operator expectations, but they are not automatic substitutes for IEC 62920 or IEC 61000 evidence in Djibouti project submissions. The same 50 Hz frequency is helpful, but EMC and harmonic performance should still be reviewed at Djibouti's 230/400 V voltage and under the final project configuration.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常依据GB/T 37408-2021及相关国内测试，由CNAS认可实验室出具。此类测试支持中国国内自愿认证和电网运营商预期，但不能在吉布提项目提交中自动替代IEC 62920或IEC 61000证据。相同的50 Hz频率有利，但仍应在吉布提230/400 V电压及最终项目配置下审查EMC和谐波性能。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常依據GB/T 37408-2021及相關國內測試，由CNAS認可實驗室出具。此類測試支持中國國內自願認證和電網運營商預期，但不能在吉布地項目提交中自動替代IEC 62920或IEC 61000證據。相同的50 Hz頻率有利，但仍應在吉布地230/400 V電壓及最終項目配置下審查EMC和諧波性能。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: GB/T EMC evidence should be treated as background only unless EDD or the project owner expressly accepts it. Exporters should prepare IEC 62920 EMC reports and applicable IEC 61000-series harmonic, flicker, and immunity evidence for the exact inverter model, firmware, filter, cable, enclosure, communications module, and site configuration. Where Chinese reports were produced at 220/380 V, confirm whether supplemental assessment or retesting at 230/400 V is required for Djibouti.
gap.zh: 差距：除非EDD或项目业主明确接受，否则GB/T EMC证据仅应作为背景材料。出口商应为准确的逆变器型号、固件、滤波器、电缆、外壳、通信模块和现场配置准备IEC 62920 EMC报告及适用IEC 61000系列谐波、闪变和抗扰度证据。若中国报告是在220/380 V条件下形成，应确认吉布提是否需要在230/400 V下补充评估或重新测试。
gap.zht: 差距：除非EDD或項目業主明確接受，否則GB/T EMC證據僅應作為背景材料。出口商應為準確的逆變器型號、韌體、濾波器、電纜、外殼、通訊模組和現場配置準備IEC 62920 EMC報告及適用IEC 61000系列諧波、閃變和抗擾度證據。若中國報告是在220/380 V條件下形成，應確認吉布地是否需要在230/400 V下補充評估或重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific; mandatory where EDD, the Ministry of Energy, a donor or lender specification, EPC, or project owner requires IEC EMC and power-quality evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or project-driven under China domestic PV inverter certification and grid-connection practice; not an automatic Djibouti acceptance route

source.publisher: Ministere de l'Energie charge des Ressources Naturelles, Djibouti

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Djibouti PV inverter EMC planning should be based on the IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 evidence requested by EDD, the Ministry of Energy, lenders, EPCs, or the project owner. Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC certificates are not automatically accepted. Review harmonic and EMC performance for the actual Djibouti 230/400 V, 50 Hz configuration, especially where Chinese test reports were generated at 220/380 V.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 吉布提光伏逆变器EMC规划应依据EDD、能源部、贷款方、EPC或项目业主要求的IEC 62920和IEC 61000证据。中国GB/T 37408 EMC证书不会被自动接受。应针对吉布提实际230/400 V、50 Hz配置审查谐波和EMC性能，尤其是在中国测试报告按220/380 V形成时。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 吉布地光伏逆變器EMC規劃應依據EDD、能源部、貸款方、EPC或項目業主要求的IEC 62920和IEC 61000證據。中國GB/T 37408 EMC證書不會被自動接受。應針對吉布地實際230/400 V、50 Hz配置審查諧波和EMC性能，尤其是在中國測試報告按220/380 V形成時。
